MINI MINUTES: Appearances: DOUGLAS WELSH, 415.377.9648, PLAINTIFF IN PRO PER; No other appearances.

RULING: The Court adopted its tentative ruling. Defendants PAUL UTRECHT'S and UTRECH & LENVIN, LLP'S SPECIAL DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT IS Denied as moot. In their Reply Brief, defendants inform the court that the other action pending, upon which this special demurrer is based, was dismissed without prejudice subsequent to the filing of this special demurrer.
